columns.description: Array of column definitions with id, title, color, icon, limit, collapsed, locked.

cards.description: Array of card data with id, title, columnId, order, priority, labels, assignees, etc.

cardSize.description: Card display density. Compact hides labels/progress, detailed shows descriptions.

className.description: Additional CSS class for the board container.

columnWidth.description: Fixed column width (px or CSS value).

allowAddCard.description: Show "Add card" button in each column footer.

allowAddColumn.description: Show "Add Column" button at the end.

allowDeleteCard.description: Show delete button on card hover.

allowDeleteColumn.description: Show delete button in column headers.

allowEditColumn.description: Enable double-click to edit column title.

allowCollapse.description: Show collapse/expand toggle in column headers.

showCardCount.description: Display card count badge in column headers.

showColumnLimit.description: Display WIP limit alongside card count.

showSearch.description: Show search input above the board.

stickyColumnHeaders.description: Make column headers sticky on scroll.

cardTemplate.description: Custom render function for card content.

columnHeaderTemplate.description: Custom render function for column headers.

columnFooterTemplate.description: Custom render function for column footers.

emptyColumnTemplate.description: Custom render function for empty columns.

cardActionsTemplate.description: Custom actions rendered in card footer area.

onCardMove.description: Called when a card is moved between columns.

onCardReorder.description: Called when cards are reordered within a column.

onCardClick.description: Called when a card is clicked.

onCardDoubleClick.description: Called when a card is double-clicked.

onCardCreate.description: Called when a new card is created via the add button.

onCardDelete.description: Called when a card delete button is clicked.

onColumnReorder.description: Called when columns are reordered via drag.

onColumnCreate.description: Called when a new column is created.

onColumnDelete.description: Called when a column is deleted.

onColumnUpdate.description: Called when a column title is edited.

onColumnCollapse.description: Called when a column is collapsed or expanded.

onSearchChange.description: Called when the search input changes.

columnId.description: ID of the column this card belongs to.

description.description: Card description shown in detailed view.

labels.description: Color-coded labels shown on the card.

assignee.description: Single assignee with name and optional avatar.

coverImage.description: Cover image URL shown in detailed mode.

progress.description: Completion percentage (0-100) shown as a progress bar.

commentCount.description: Number of comments shown as a badge.

attachmentCount.description: Number of attachments shown as a badge.

blocked.description: Mark the card as blocked with a visual overlay.

color.description: Left border color for the card.
Accent color for the column header indicator.

icon.description: Icon displayed next to the column title.

limit.description: Maximum number of cards (WIP limit). Visual warning when exceeded.

collapsed.description: Initial collapsed state of the column.

locked.description: Prevent all interactions (drag, edit, add, delete).
